about.title: About Me
about.description: I hold a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering (First Class Honors) from Rajamangala University of Technology Phra Nakhon. I have a strong passion for software development, focusing on building scalable backend architectures and intuitive cross-platform applications.
